title: albizia tomentella var. rotundata
intro: Albizia tomentella var. rotundata, also known as the Rotundate Albizia tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In traditional Chinese medicine, the Rotundate Albizia tree is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used to make herbal teas and tinctures.
